title: Start Me Up
why_this_song: Start Me Up by The Rolling Stones (1981) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "never" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "never" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "start" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "start" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: If you start me up, I'll never stop
Don't make a grown man cry
Oh baby, just slide it up

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Rolling Stones one question about "Start Me Up", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Rolling Stones sobre "Start Me Up", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Start Me Up" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Start Me Up" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Start Me Up" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Start Me Up" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Start Me Up" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Start Me Up" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
